overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a futuristic waterfront promenade, transitioning through a parking area and covered walkway beneath an elevated building structure. The scene features bright sunlight, palm trees, parked vehicles, and modern architecture with a mix of open and enclosed spaces.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade approaching a modern office building

notable_agents.action: couple walking ahead along the promenade, moving in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: row of rectangular concrete blocks separating walkway from water
tall palm trees lining the distant waterfront edge
distant futuristic city towers visible across the water
large multi-story building with dark glass facade approaching on the left
calm water channel running parallel to the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright, sunny waterfront promenade with concrete barriers separating the walkway from the water. The camera moves forward toward a modern office building on the left, passing a couple walking ahead. Palm trees line the distant right side while a futuristic city skyline is visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban parking lot under elevated structure

events.description: turns left from waterfront promenade into parking lot area with parked vehicles
navigates between parked cars while continuing forward through the lot

agents.ego_description: turning left into the parking area and weaving between parked vehicles and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in red top standing near the parked cars, facing away from camera

entered.detail: vintage-style blue sedan parked in the lot
pink sports car parked further ahead
orange and black parking meter posts lining the right side
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on the building
massive concrete support pillars for the overhead structure
traffic signal with orange housing visible near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into a parking lot beneath an elevated building structure, leaving the waterfront behind. The scene features parked cars including a distinctive blue sedan and pink sports car, parking meters, and large digital billboards. The lighting becomes mixed as the area is partially shaded by the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under building overpass

events.description: enters dark covered walkway with artificial overhead lighting, losing natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit covered corridor beneath the building structure

entered.detail: long rectangular fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling
bright orange safety railings lining the left side of the walkway
low dark concrete ceiling of the covered walkway
illuminated digital display showing video content on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark, enclosed walkway beneath the building, transitioning from mixed natural light to artificial fluorescent lighting. The corridor features orange safety railings, concrete pillars, and a low dark ceiling. The environment is quiet with no visible pedestrians as the camera moves toward a bright exit at the far end.

events.description: exits the covered walkway into bright sunlight, transitioning from artificial to natural lighting
emerges from enclosed walkway back to open waterfront promenade with palm trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sunlit promenade with palm trees lining the right side

entered.detail: tall palm trees now prominent and close on the right side of the walkway
intense sunlight flooding the exit of the covered area creating high contrast
concrete seating structures along the right edge of the promenade

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the dark covered walkway into bright sunlight, transitioning back to an open palm-lined waterfront promenade. The scene features tall palm trees on the right, a modern glass building on the left, and concrete benches. The lighting shifts dramatically from artificial to intense natural sunlight as the walk continues along the waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched waterfront promenade through a shaded urban underpass and back into the bright open air. It begins on a bright concrete walkway beside the water, moving past pedestrians toward a modern office building with a futuristic skyline in the distance. As the camera turns left, the scene shifts from the open coast into a partially shaded parking lot filled with colorful futuristic cars and digital billboards beneath an elevated structure. The environment then narrows and darkens as the camera enters an enclosed corridor of concrete pillars and orange safety railings, transitioning from natural light to artificial fluorescent glows. Finally, the camera emerges from the dark tunnel back into intense sunlight, returning to a palm-lined promenade featuring glass architecture and concrete benches.
